name: melee-baseline
ruleReference: CP2020 p.100: Melee Attacker vs Defender opposed roll; CP2020 p.100: Melee damage = weapon + strength bonus

singleShotCases.name: melee-attacker-wins
singleShotCases.ruleReference: CP2020 p.100: Melee opposed roll — attacker wins = hit; strength damage bonus applied

singleShotCases.name: melee-defender-wins
singleShotCases.ruleReference: CP2020 p.100: Melee opposed roll — defender wins = miss

singleShotCases.name: melee-tie
singleShotCases.ruleReference: CP2020 p.100: Melee tie = defender wins (attacker does not beat defender)

singleShotCases.name: melee-fumble
singleShotCases.ruleReference: CP2020 p.99: Melee Natural 1 = fumble (miss)

singleShotCases.name: melee-actorless-target

manualResolution.message: Target Actor is unavailable; resolve target damage, armor, and saves manually.

singleShotCases.ruleReference: Audit: Missing target actor blocks melee resolution

singleShotCases.name: martial-action-shell
singleShotCases.ruleReference: CP2020 p.101: Martial Arts — Strike (baseline damageOnly category)

singleShotCases.name: martial-strike-karate-bonus
singleShotCases.ruleReference: CP2020 p.101: Karate Strike +2 key technique bonus

singleShotCases.name: martial-kick-savate-bonus
singleShotCases.ruleReference: CP2020 p.101: Savate Kick +2 key technique bonus

singleShotCases.name: martial-block-parry
singleShotCases.ruleReference: CP2020 p.101: Boxing Block/Parry +1 key technique bonus (non-damage category)

singleShotCases.name: martial-dodge-capoeira
singleShotCases.ruleReference: CP2020 p.101: Capoeira Dodge +1 key technique bonus (non-damage category)

singleShotCases.name: martial-disarm-aikido
singleShotCases.ruleReference: CP2020 p.101: Aikido Disarm +1; prerequisite check (requires BlockParry, Dodge)

singleShotCases.name: martial-grapple-karate
singleShotCases.ruleReference: CP2020 p.101: Karate Grapple (grappleFamily, no key technique bonus for grapple)

singleShotCases.name: martial-choke-requires-hold
singleShotCases.ruleReference: CP2020 p.101: Choke requires prerequisite Hold state (confirmed)

singleShotCases.name: martial-escape-requires-grapple-hold
singleShotCases.ruleReference: CP2020 p.101: Escape requires Grapple or Hold state (confirmed); Judo +1

singleShotCases.name: martial-unknown-action-fallback
singleShotCases.ruleReference: CP2020 p.101: Unknown martial action falls back to damageOnly category

singleShotCases.name: melee-bt13-vs-bt14
singleShotCases.ruleReference: CP2020 p.106: BTM table — BT 13 = -6, BT 14 = -6; strengthDamageBonus BT 13 = +5

singleShotCases.name: melee-bt15-vs-bt15
singleShotCases.ruleReference: CP2020 p.106: BTM table — BT 15 = -8; strengthDamageBonus BT 15 = +8

singleShotCases.name: melee-bt10-vs-bt10
singleShotCases.ruleReference: CP2020 p.106: BTM table — BT 10 = -4; strengthDamageBonus BT 10 = +2

singleShotCases.name: melee-bt11-vs-bt11
singleShotCases.ruleReference: CP2020 p.106: BTM table — BT 11 = -5; strengthDamageBonus BT 11 = +4

singleShotCases.name: martial-throw-requires-grapple-without-state
singleShotCases.ruleReference: CP2020 p.101: Throw requires Grapple + BlockParry + Dodge prerequisites (unconfirmed)

singleShotCases.name: martial-choke-without-hold-state
singleShotCases.ruleReference: CP2020 p.101: Choke requires Hold (unconfirmed) — manual resolution required

singleShotCases.name: martial-escape-without-any-state
singleShotCases.ruleReference: CP2020 p.101: Escape requires Grapple or Hold (unconfirmed) — manual resolution required

singleShotCases.name: martial-hold-requires-grapple-with-state
singleShotCases.ruleReference: CP2020 p.101: Hold requires Grapple (confirmed); Aikido +1

singleShotCases.name: martial-sweep-trip-basic
singleShotCases.ruleReference: CP2020 p.101: Sweep/Trip (grappleFamily); Capoeira +1
